Spring will here before know
now's perfect time start thinking about your landscaping projects.
best things your lawn rake clear away debris.
This breaks thatch that starves soil vital nutrients water.
Most time, this done hand.
But, thatch thick, you'll want rent power rake hire take care you.
You'll spend about $300, results will worth
Next, apply fertilizer herbicide your lawn.
Just sure check packaging application instructions.
last thing want over-apply burn your lawn.
Another great project tackle spring planting trees shrubs.
with sod, cooler temps abundance moisture critical tree's ability take root.
Don't make mistake waiting until temps hot.
there's good chance your trees won't make through summer.
What's more, you'll find that your options more abundant early season.
Tree prices more expensive size tree increases, prepared spend more want instant shade.
underground sprinkler system might world's greatest invention, we'd argue that it's most convenient.
While sprinkler system won't fundamentally change look your yard, will make easier maintain.
Gone days waking early water.
What's more, sprinkler system takes guesswork watering adjusting watering times based weather conditions, saving water saving money.
size your yard will determine installation cost, average, expect spend about $2,450 have sprinkler system installed.
Last least, smartest things you're planning major changes your landscaping hire certified landscape designer.
about $4,300, professional will carefully design landscaping plan that complements your home delivers look functionality you're looking for.
Just keep mind that installation typically included price.
average, expect spend additional $4,000 installation.
